markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new content artifacts and align on the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content OS:** A reworked strategy includes an 8th topic cluster for "Customer Support & White Glove Service" and an Airtable with 140+ blog ideas for review.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Navan will prioritize content for the Travel Manager, Procurement, and Finance Leader personas, plus the AI cluster once messaging guidelines are ready.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Review Workflow:** Libby, Rich, and Moran will form the initial review committee for all drafts to ensure voice, product accuracy, and SEO quality.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**Fact-Checking:** A "Product Feature Matrix" will be created from product deep-dives to serve as a single source of truth for fact-checking all content.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [Topic clusters were reworked using Nima's persona context and competitor analysis (Rita McKay, PLEO, Spendesk).](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [An 8th cluster, "Customer Support & White Glove Service," was added to target keywords for:](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Flight disruptions and delays](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Executive travel pain points](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [White glove service features](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Clarification:** Rich noted that Navan's general travel support and Rita McKay's white glove service are distinct products.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Content Calendar & Prioritization

  - [The content calendar is in Airtable with 140+ blog ideas for review.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [**Prioritization Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [**Clusters:** Navan will prioritize content for the Travel Manager, Procurement, and Finance Leader personas.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [**AI Cluster:** Content is on hold pending new AI messaging guidelines from Nikita and Ava.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Individual Posts:** Navan will use the Airtable dropdown to approve specific ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**Keyword Data:** Moran noted SEMrush volumes for long-tail keywords may be inflated.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**GrowthX Response:** Acknowledged the data limitation and will explore supplementing it with Ahrefs.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Rationale for Low-Volume Keywords:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
          - [**AI Search:** Higher likelihood of appearing in AI-generated summaries (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [**Secondary Keywords:** Each post ranks for 10–15 related keywords, driving more traffic than the primary keyword suggests.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Content Workflow & Review Process

  - [**Content Refresh Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [New posts will refresh and link to relevant older content (e.g., from 2019, 2022).](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [GrowthX will conduct a blog performance analysis to identify top refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**Review Committee:** Libby, Rich, and Moran will review all drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Libby & Rich:** Focus on voice, style, and product messaging accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Moran:** Focus on broader SEO context beyond just meta titles.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Week 1:** 1 calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Week 2:** 3 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Scaling:** 5 blogs per week](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Supporting Artifacts

  - [**Product Feature Matrix:** A Notion doc will be created this week to serve as a single source of truth for fact-checking product claims, preventing AI-generated inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [**Featured Image Examples:** Two concepts (environment photography, human imagery) were shared for Navan's brand team to review.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [**Paid Keyword Analysis:** GrowthX is analyzing Navan's paid keywords to identify new content opportunities, especially for pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Libby:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [Share new AI messaging guidelines with GrowthX once available.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [Share featured image examples with Navan's brand team for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [Share the Airtable content calendar link in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Create and share the "Product Feature Matrix" Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [Send the first calibration blog to Libby, Rich, and Moran for review.](https://fathom.video/share/NgF8vZk4P7tKMUY-7Z4mvwpPQY9U9diV?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
